test-method.description: Cart icon should be visible in navbar

test-method.description: Home page should load and display the LeafyBooks logo

test-method.description: Login page should load correctly

test-method.name: testLogin_WithValidCredentials
test-method.description: Login with valid admin credentials should redirect to home

test-method.name: testLogin_WithWrongPassword
test-method.description: Login with wrong password should show error message

test-method.name: testLogout_RedirectsToHome
test-method.description: Logout should redirect to home and show Login button again
